keyPoints: Metadata is the 'descriptive information' about data.
Metadata helps in making data 'discoverable, accessible, and usable'.
Business metadata helps in describing data from a business perspective.
Technical metadata helps in describing data from a technical perspective.
Functional metadata helps in describing data from a functional perspective.
Business metadata includes data such as customer information, sales data, and inventory levels.
Technical metadata includes data such as data types, storage locations, and data formats.
Functional metadata includes data such as data quality, data source, and data format.
